info.title: Klaviyo API (Beta)
info.description: The Klaviyo REST API. Please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com for more details.

get.description:
> 🚧 This endpoint is in beta and subject to change. > > A beta revision header (2026-01-15.pre) is required to use our beta APIs. Klaviyo APIs in beta are not intended for use in production. See our [versioning and deprecation policy](https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/docs/api_versioning_and_deprecation_policy) for more information. Get the source mapping with the given ID.

*Rate limits*:
Burst: `3/s`
Steady: `60/m` **Scopes:** `custom-objects:read` [OpenAPI Spec](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/klaviyo/openapi/main/openapi/beta/apis/get_source_mapping_beta.json)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the source mapping

schema.description: The ID of the source mapping

id.description: The ID of the schema property. Must be a postive integer.

name.description: The name of the schema property

type.description: The type of the schema property

description.description: The description of the schema property

id.description: Property ID. Must be a positive integer.

value.description: Constant value assigned to every record

id_path.description: JSONPath data selector to owning ID

related_id_path.description: JSONPath data selector to related ID

update_strategy.description: Strategy for updating relationships with each new RawDataRecord ingestion

status.description: The status of this object schema

required.description: Properties that are required on the object schema

source-mapping.description: The source mapping to create with this object schema

id.description: The ID of the related profile schema.

namespace.description: The namespace of this object type. Either `custom-objects` or `applications/<application_id>`, where `<application_id>` is the ULID of the OAuth application that owns the object type. Defaults to `custom-objects`.

Klaviyo-API-Key.name: Authorization
Klaviyo-API-Key.description:
Private key authentication for /api/ endpoints is performed by setting the `Authorization` header to `Klaviyo-API-Key your-private-api-key`
For more information please visit https://developers.klaviyo.com/en/v2026-04-15.pre/reference/api-overview#authentication
